Short CV

Res. Asst. Exp. Pt. Beyzanur Dikmen Hoşbaş completed her undergraduate education in Gazi University Faculty of Health Sciences, Department of Physiotherapy and Rehabilitation in 2016 with a high honor degree and worked as a physiotherapist in a special education and rehabilitation center. In January 2022, she completed her master's thesis on 'Evaluation of the Acute Effects of Vibration and Kinesiological Tape Applications to the Affected Side Forearm Extensor Muscles on Hand Skills in Children with Unilateral Cerebral Palsy' and received her science specialization. In 2022, she started her PhD education at Istanbul University-Cerrahpaşa Postgraduate Education Institute Physiotherapy and Rehabilitation Department. Beyzanur Dikmen Hoşbaş is a Research Assistant at the Faculty of Health Sciences, Department of Physiotherapy and Rehabilitation.
